full_text:
Cheng Ji (Jiran) 程畿 (季然)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Cheng Ji (程畿), styledJiran (季然), was born in Ba. Advisor to Liu Bei. After Liu Bei’s defeat at Yiling he chose to die rather than surrender. Cheng Ji was affiliated with Liu Zhang and the Shu Kingdom. Cheng Ji lived during the Three Kingdoms periods of Chinese history.
